import React from "react"; import { Chip } from "@mui/material"; const skills = { languages: [ { name: "HTML", emoji: "🌐", color: "#2196F3" }, { name: "CSS", emoji: "🎨", color: "#E91E63" }, { name: "JavaScript", emoji: "⚡", color: "#4CAF50" }, { name: "TypeScript", emoji: "🛠️", color: "#00BCD4" }, { name: "Python", emoji: "🐍", color: "#FF9800" }, ], frameworks: [ { name: "React", emoji: "⚛️", color: "#3F51B5" }, { name: "React Native", emoji: "📱", color: "#673AB7" }, { name: "Django", emoji: "🐍", color: "#8BC34A" }, ], databases: [ { name: "PostgreSQL", emoji: "🐘", color: "#336791" }, { name: "SQL", emoji: "🗄️", color: "#4479A1" }, { name: "MySQL", emoji: "🐬", color: "#F29111" }, { name: "NoSQL", emoji: "📂", color: "#6B57FF" }, ], tools: [{ name: "Share Hosting", emoji: "📡", color: "#795548" }], cloud: [ { name: "Azure", emoji: "☁️", color: "#03A9F4" }, { name: "Digital Ocean", emoji: "🌊", color: "#009688" }, ], os: [ { name: "Mac", emoji: "🍏", color: "#607D8B" }, { name: "Windows", emoji: "🖥️", color: "#1E88E5" }, { name: "Linux", emoji: "🐧", color: "#000000" }, ], others: [], }; export default function Skills() { return (

#skills

size=8 size=4 size=4 {Object.entries(skills).map(([category, skillsList], index) => (

{category.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + category.slice(1)}

    {skillsList.map((skill, skillIndex) => (
  • {`${skill.emoji} ${skill.name}`}
    • ))}
))} size=8
); }
